name: Stickman Bike Runner
description: A game about a Stickman on a mountain bike going up a hill. Stickman eventually gets tired and the game ends, but you can extend his ascent by taking the batteries that will appear along the way. Arrange a competition with your friends, who will drive the longest!
instructions: Computer - arrows on the keyboard Smartphone tablet - touch control
tags: Bike, Boy, Boys, Race, Racing, run, running, Stickman
